title: University of Glasgow - Scholarships & funding - Global Leadership Scholarship
text:
Global Leadership Scholarship
Please, note the latest date to apply is 17th July 2026, 11:59AM (UK Time). Any late applications will not be accepted.
The University of Glasgow has several Global Leadership Scholarships available to International fee students starting a postgraduate taught Masters programme in any discipline for Academic Session 2026/2027. The scholarship is awarded as a tuition fees discount for one year only.
To be eligible, applicants must
demonstrate academic excellence and achieve grades equivalent to UK 1st Class Honours
hold an offer of a place for a full-time 1 year Masters programme for September 2026
have International or EU fee status
Please note that diplomas and certificates are not eligible for this scholarship. Only 1-year, full-time, in-person Master programmes are eligible, with the exception of Book and Paper Conservation MPhil and Textile Conservation MPhil.
